title: DeckSpec
description: Deck manifest. One file per deck at spec/slides/{deck-slug}/deck.json. The `slides` array names the slide files (without .json) in the order they should appear; disabling a slide is done in the slide JSON itself via `enabled: false`.

presenter.description: Default presenter name shown in the chip.

theme.description: Active theme palette. Brand presets (`noir-gold`, `bright-gold`) plus IDE/OS-inspired skins (`vscode-dark`, `dracula`, `monokai`, `github-light`, `macos-sonoma`, `windows-11`). Switched live via the controller's palette button; persisted with the deck on export.

preset.description: Optional reusable slide preset. `premium` locks Ubuntu Bold titles, clamp-based sizing, and auto-picks title color (white for hero slides, gold when titleShimmer is true, cream otherwise) for every slide that does not declare its own `titleStyle`. Per-slide values always win.

slides.description: Ordered list of slide file basenames (without .json), e.g. "01-title".

brandStrip.description: Optional thin branded strip rendered above the standard BrandHeader on every slide. Per-slide overrides win (`slide.brandStrip: false` to hide on a single slide; object to replace).

logoAsset.description: Registered bundled logo asset. Preferred for export/import because the renderer resolves it to the built image URL.

logo.description: Direct image src for the primary logo. Use only for absolute/export-safe URLs; otherwise prefer `logoAsset`.

logoAlt.description: Alt text. Also used as the text-only fallback when no asset can resolve.

logoHeight.description: Logo height in px. Clamped 12–32 so it never overflows the 36px strip.

logoAlign.description: Horizontal position of the logo. When `right`, the tagline (if any) automatically moves to the left edge to avoid overlap.

padding.description: Horizontal padding preset applied to both edges of the strip.

tagline.description: Tagline pill text, e.g. "Riseup Asia LLC · 2026 Deck". Anchored opposite the logo.

meeting.description: Deck-wide meeting/QR defaults consumed by QrMeetingSlide. Per-slide `content.meetingUrl` / `content.meetingLabel` / `content.qrAsset` always win.

url.description: Live URL the QR encodes (e.g. "https://cal.com/riseup-asia/intro"). Used when no per-slide URL or branded asset is set.

label.description: Human-readable label shown next to the QR (e.g. "cal.com/riseup-asia/intro"). Falls back to a derived host when omitted.

qrAsset.description: Registered branded QR asset slug. When set, the bundled PNG wins over `url` (treat the asset as authored brand artwork). Slug must be registered under deck.assets.qr or in the built-in registry.

assets.description: Deck-level asset registry. Lets a deck override or extend the built-in audio/QR/brand/icon registries. Every asset slug referenced by the deck or any slide MUST resolve at boot — missing references throw an aggregated error with the exact slide + slug. See `src/slides/assetRegistry.ts`.

audio.description: Audio cue slug → URL. Built-ins: whoosh, click, fadeClick, zoom, fadeZoom. Override an entry to point at a custom MP3, or add new slugs and reference them from `slide.sound.kind`.

qr.description: QR slug → image URL. Built-in: `riseup-meeting`. Slides reference these via `content.qrAsset` or `deck.meeting.qrAsset`.

brand.description: Brand chrome slug → image URL. Built-ins: `logo`, `logo-trimmed`, `presenter`. Used by BrandHeader / BrandStrip.

icons.description: Ambient icon slug remap. Key is the slug used in slide JSON; value must be a built-in icon-registry slug. Use this to rename or alias icons without changing slide files.

transitionTiming.description: Deck-wide default transition timing applied to every slide. Per-slide `content.transitionTiming` overrides this field-by-field. Lets a deck enforce one consistent cadence (e.g. 700ms expoOut on every slide) without repeating the override on every slide. Required for blind-AI reproducibility. v0.147.

durationMs.description: Animation length in ms. Clamped to [0, 4000]. Default 550.

delayMs.description: Pre-animation hold in ms. Clamped to [0, 4000]. Default 0.

easing.description: Named easing or 4-tuple cubic-bezier. Default expoOut [0.22, 1, 0.36, 1].
